ticket.title: FIX DATE FIELD CORRUPTION ON GDX BOOKING LOOKUP

test_cases.description: Verify GDX 21544 (Togonon, single-day booking) renders the correct date 'Aug 14, 2026' instead of the corrupted 'Aug 14, -0,0'.
test_cases.comments: Single-day bookings appear to trigger a null/undefined year concatenation bug.

test_cases.description: Verify GDX 21771 (Campaña, single-day booking) renders 'Jul 2, 2026' instead of 'Jul 2-0,0'.
test_cases.comments: Same single-day date bug pattern as TC001.

test_cases.description: Verify GDX 21851 (Chua, multi-day booking) renders 'Sep 15-17, 2026' instead of the incorrect 'Sep 15-Oct 2, 2026'.
test_cases.expected_result: Dates field displays the correct end date within the same month, matching source data.
test_cases.actual_result: Displayed as 'Sep 15-Oct 2, 2026' - end date rolled into the following month.
test_cases.comments: Distinct from the single-day bug - this is a date-range calculation error.

test_cases.description: Test additional single-day bookings not previously flagged (e.g., GDX 21784 Davao, Jun 22 2026) to confirm whether the single-day date bug is isolated or affects all single-day bookings site-wide.
test_cases.expected_result: All single-day bookings render correctly formatted dates with no truncated/garbled year segment.
test_cases.actual_result: Not yet tested - GDX 21784 currently returns 'Booking not found' (see TC-Tour and NotFound sheet), so its date field could not be checked.

test_cases.description: Verify date formatting consistency across all destinations after the fix (format should always be 'Mon D-D, YYYY' or 'Mon D, YYYY').
test_cases.expected_result: No destination or booking shows an inconsistent date format post-fix.
test_cases.actual_result: Not yet re-tested; fix has not been deployed.
